title: 8 Herbal Teas For Gout
description: Rheum palmatum teas contains active constituents like flavonoids, alkaloids, and tannins. These compounds work together to reduce inflammation and ease pain associated with gout. The alkaloids in Rheum palmatum have been shown to inhibit the production of uric acid, a major contributor to gout attacks. The flavonoids have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and ease joint pain. The tannins in Rheum palmatum also have a mild diuretic effect, which can help to flu...
